name: Tytan Holdings, Inc.
summary: Tytan Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiary, Tytan International, Inc., engages in the manufacture of tractors and crawlers in China. The company sells its products in the United States. It also has various patents in the United States on the design and construction of implements used with the tractors and crawlers. The company was formerly known as Ault Glazer & Co., Inc. and changed its name to Tytan Holdings, Inc. in October 2009. Tytan Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kalama, Washington.
